periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. North wind around 3 mph.

periods.name: Monday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. East wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Monday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. South wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday
periods.short_forecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 91. Heat index values as high as 103. Southwest wind 9 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
